summary: P0 Finance Verification Flow testing completed successfully. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Finance Verification page functionality working correctly including View Details modal showing payment method, course name, payment proofs, split payment details, and BNPL phone verification. Approve Payment requires transaction reference before enabling.
passed_tests: Backend: Login successful with super admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/courses returns available courses
Backend: POST /api/leads creates lead successfully
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with stage=in_progress and course interest works
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} to enrolled with all payment fields (payment_method, payment_proof, bnpl_phone, etc.) saves correctly
Backend: Finance verification record created automatically on enrollment
Backend: GET /api/finance/verifications returns all payment fields including is_split_payment, payment_splits, bnpl_phone
Backend: GET /api/finance/verifications/{id} returns complete verification detail
Backend: Split payment enrollment works with multiple payment methods
Backend: GET /api/finance/transactions returns verified transactions
Backend: Finance verification has all UI required fields
Frontend: Finance Verifications page loads at /finance/clt/verifications
Frontend: Page shows 4 tabs: Pending Verification (with count), Verified, Rejected, Transactions
Frontend: Pending verifications table shows Customer, Course, Amount, Payment Method, Sales Executive, Submitted, Actions
Frontend: View Details button opens Payment Verification Details dialog
Frontend: Details dialog shows Customer, Phone, Email, Course, Sales Executive, Submitted datetime
Frontend: Details dialog shows Payment Information with method, amount, date
Frontend: Split payment verifications show all payment methods with amounts (e.g., Tabby AED 6,000 + Bank Transfer AED 4,000)
Frontend: BNPL payments show phone number with 'Different Number' badge when bnpl_same_number is false
Frontend: Payment Proofs section shows tabs for each payment method's screenshot
Frontend: Approve Payment button present in details dialog
Frontend: Clicking Verify button opens 'Verify Payment' dialog
Frontend: Verify dialog shows Transaction Verification Required section
Frontend: For split payments, shows separate Transaction Reference input for each method
Frontend: Transaction Reference inputs marked as required (*)
Frontend: Clicking Confirm Verification without references shows error toast and inline validation errors
critical_code_review_comments: LeadUpdate model properly includes all payment fields: payment_method, payment_proof, payment_date, is_split_payment, payment_splits, bnpl_phone, bnpl_same_number
update_lead function correctly creates finance_verification record with all payment data on enrollment
Finance verification record includes: customer_name, phone, email, course_name, sale_amount, payment_method, payment_proof, is_split_payment, payment_splits, bnpl_phone, bnpl_same_number, status
GET /api/finance/verifications endpoint returns all fields needed by FinanceVerificationsPage.jsx
FinanceVerificationsPage.jsx View Details dialog properly renders split payments, BNPL phone info, and payment proofs
Verify Payment dialog requires transaction references for each payment method before allowing verification
All data-testid attributes present: finance-verifications-page, view-verification-{id}
seed_data_creation: Created test leads for enrollment flow: TEST_Finance_Verify_Lead, TEST_Split_Payment_Lead. These were automatically cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Finance Verification flow is complete and working. Key flows tested: 1) Lead enrollment from Sales CRM via EnrollmentPaymentModal captures all payment fields (method, proof, amount, split payments, BNPL phone); 2) Backend creates finance_verification record with all data when lead is enrolled; 3) Finance team can access verifications at /finance/clt/verifications; 4) View Details dialog shows complete payment info including split payment breakdown and payment proofs; 5) Approve Payment requires transaction reference input for each payment method before allowing verification. The route for Finance Verifications is /finance/clt/verifications (under CLT Academy entity).

feature_verification.PUT /api/leads/{id} with payment fields: WORKING - All payment fields saved to lead and finance_verifications
feature_verification.GET /api/finance/verifications: WORKING - Returns list with all payment fields
feature_verification.FinanceVerificationsPage: WORKING - Shows pending/verified/rejected tabs with table
feature_verification.View Details Dialog: WORKING - Shows customer, course, payment method, payment proofs, split payment details, BNPL info
feature_verification.Approve Payment Flow: WORKING - Requires transaction reference before enabling verification
